title: 2 Large Pink Flower Peony Sara Bernhardt Garden Roots Peonies Growing Prennial Plants
features: The heirloom of 1906 is one of the strongest growers and the most reliable bloomers with a delightfully pretty scent. No wonder it has received the RHS's Award if Garden of Merit.
These stunning bloomer with produce its extravagant display in early June every year.
They are among the most durable and longest-lived plants.
A gorgeous coloured flower set against mid green foliage and leaves that will come into bloom mid summer.
Peonies are easy to grow and can live for decades, often 50 years+ in a garden.
